title: About
description: We started Purpose Brands because brilliant food, drink, and wellness brands deserve better than a spreadsheet-driven Amazon agency.

intro.heading: We built the agency we wished existed.
body: Every Amazon agency we met was either a massive machine that forgot your name after the pitch, or a one-person show making it up as they went.
So we built something different. Two people. Senior from day one. Only food, drink, and wellness. Only Amazon.
We called it Purpose Brands because we wanted to work with people who are building something that actually matters. Not just selling units.

bios.name: Phoebe Bocchinelli
bios.lede: 15 years in consumer brands. Worked with Moët Hennessy, Veuve Clicquot, Heineken, and Belvedere Vodka. 6 of those years specifically on Amazon across the UK and US.
body: Started Purpose Brands because too many great brands were getting a raw deal from agencies that didn't understand their world. Based on the South Devon coast. Happiest near the sea. Will always be honest with you, even when it's not what you want to hear.

bios.name: Biraj Parmar
bios.lede: Built an Amazon and D2C brand from scratch. Sold it for seven figures in 2021. Stayed on as a brand consultant because he couldn't stop tinkering.
body: Has been a seller, a brand owner, an internal consultant, and now the person helping your brand win. Knows what works because he's done it himself — not because he read a playbook.

sas.body: We're a Surfers Against Sewage Ocean Network member. We live on the South Devon coast. Protecting our waters isn't a CSR box-tick — it's personal.
